top_signals.title: Oil prices rise 4% as U.S. and Iran fight for control of Strait of Hormuz - CNBC
top_signals.summary: Oil prices rise 4% as U.S. and Iran fight for control of Strait of Hormuz  CNBC
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: SBI Funds IPO Anchor Book 20 Times Subscribed; Draws Capital Group, BlackRock, Goldman, ADIA, GIC
top_signals.summary: The Capital Group Inc., BlackRock Inc., Fidelity Investments and Goldman Sachs Asset Management L.P. are among key investors that participated in the anchor book of SBI Funds Management Ltd., which was subscribed more than 20 times before the company’s initial public offering, according to people familiar with the matter.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Crypto fatwa sparks debate over Pakistan’s digital asset framework
top_signals.summary: Pakistan’s crypto regulator held talks with prominent Islamic scholar Mufti Taqi Usmani after a fatwa declared crypto purchases impermissible under Islam.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: New BMW M3: why the next one arrives as both a 1,000bhp EV and a petrol straight-six
top_signals.summary: BMW has confirmed the next M3 will come in electric and petrol versions. It looks like a simple product decision, but it says far more about an industry still unsure what a performance car should be in the electric age. For years the industry told a tidy story about all this. Electrification would arrive, petrol [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: 'Ghostcommit' hides prompt injection in images to fool AI agents, steal secrets
top_signals.summary: A PNG hiding a prompt injection could steal your repo's secrets, researchers demonstrate. The technique, dubbed 'Ghostcommit,' slipped past AI code reviewers CodeRabbit and Bugbot, which never open image files at all, then convinced a coding agent to read a repo's .env and write every secret into the code as a list of numbers. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Citroën 2CV returns as a £13,000 electric car, and the timing is no accident
top_signals.summary: Citroën is reviving one of its most famous cars as a sub-£15,000 electric city car. It looks like a nostalgia play, but it is really a response to a gap Europe’s carmakers left at the cheap end of the market, one that Chinese rivals are now moving quickly to fill. Citroën’s decision to bring back [...]
